payload.answer: This looks like a new contextual music-listening preference. I can’t save it directly in this role; here are repair options for how it could be handled.
repair_options: Add as a separate contextual preference: prefers Sonny Rollins over John Coltrane for relaxed Sunday listening.
If there is already a jazz preference stored, keep both preferences if they apply to different contexts.
If an existing preference says the opposite for relaxed Sunday listening, ask the user whether this supersedes or corrects the older preference.
Do not store this unless the user confirms it should be remembered.
